nasb.text: So he returned to him, and behold, he was standing beside his burnt offering, he and all the leaders of Moab.

esv.text: And he returned to him, and behold, he and all the princes of Moab were standing beside his burnt offering.

cnv.text: 他就回到巴勒那裡，見他和摩押所有的領袖都站在燔祭旁邊。

ccb.text: 巴兰就回到巴勒那里，看见他和摩押的臣仆们都站在燔祭旁边。
